name: image-prompt-architect
description: Codex skill for AI image prompt design, critique, model adaptation, and cinematic series prompt bibles.

interface.shortDescription: Design and critique AI image prompts.
interface.longDescription: Image Prompt Architect packages a reusable image-prompt design workflow. It supports seven-layer prompts, multi-system series bibles, model-specific prompt ports, prompt critique, lint checks, and iteration rubrics.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Image Prompt Architect to turn my image idea into a structured, model-adapted prompt.
